title: Doctor Krishna
subTitle: Doctor Krishna and Swathi, who are in love with each other, get married. However, their marital life is in trouble when Krishna's parents force him to marry another girl.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva and Parvati rejoice as the ten Rishis prepare to perform the sacred act of circumambulation around them as a gesture of reverence. However Parvati's joy turns to dismay when Rishi Bhringi declines to pay homage to her, causing her to feel.

title: Ashtralle Just Missoo
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati fall in love at the start of the universe. Their eternal love story becomes a legendary tale of devotion for future generations.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Shambuki's decision to deliver her babies alone adds to the tension for Diti and Tarakasura. Meanwhile, Tarakasura is overjoyed as the protectors of the Asura empire descend. The unfolding events are bound to shape the future of the Asura empire.

title: Siddu
subTitle: Siddu borrows money from a goon and agrees to transport a huge sum to the goon's friend in return. Things get out of hand when Siddu loses the money and the goon kidnaps his sister and brother-in-law.

title: Chandu
subTitle: Chandu, a college student, beats up a gangster for his unjust acts. Fearing the wrath of the gangster, his parents send him to Bengaluru, where he meets the love of his life.

title: Sampathige Saval
subTitle: Siddappa, a cruel landlord, refuses to pay the funeral expenses of his servant after his accidental death. Angered by the betrayal, the worker's son, Veerabhadra, grows up to resent Siddappa.

title: Baro Nanna Muddina Krishna
subTitle: A corrupt police officer falls in love with a young policewoman, Radha, who works at the same police station. When Radha finds out about his dishonest ways of operating, she leaves him.

title: Thandege Thakka Maga
subTitle: Sathya is forced to marry a woman from a lower caste after his father's sudden death. He struggles to lead a happy marital life while dealing with certain problems.

title: E-Mannu
subTitle: Niranjan Nittoor, a software engineer by education, gets trapped in circumstances that force him to move to his father's rural property, where he tries his hands at farming.

title: E-Mannu
subTitle: Niranjan Nittoor, a software engineer by education, gets trapped in circumstances that force him to move to his father's rural property, where he tries his hands at farming.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Rishi Bhringi fumes with rage and announces his intention to separate Lord Shiva and Parvati. Meanwhile, Lord Shiva is disappointed and instructs Rishi Bhringi to rectify his mistake by accepting the truth.

title: Beku
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Tarakasura's three sons, Tarakaksha, Vidyunmali, and Kamalaksha, possess immense power. Shambuki discloses that they are engaged in rigorous penance to appease Brahma Deva and obtain a crucial boon. Will Brahma Deva grant their earnest request?

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati are overwhelmed with eternal joy as Devi Swaroopa brings forth their son, Kartikeya, after receiving a boon from Lord Brahma. How will the divine couple's hearts swell with love when they cradle their newborn.

title: Thandege Thakka Maga
subTitle: Sathya is forced to marry a woman from a lower caste after his father's sudden death. He struggles to lead a happy marital life while dealing with certain problems.

title: Janumada Jodi
subTitle: A lovelorn village boy, Krishna, and a girl, Kanaka, cross all barriers of caste and tradition to unite in a meaningful manner.

title: Anuraga Aralithu
subTitle: Shankar, a factory worker, is forced to marry his employer's daughter who is arrogant. He decides to teach her a lesson in order to make her realize her fault.

title: Mungaru Male 2
subTitle: Preetham, the son of Suryakanth, a millionaire, is driven by excitement and easily gets bored when it comes to relationships. He understands love after he meets Nandini.

title: Thavarige Baa Thangi
subTitle: Lakshmi faces trouble when her in-laws hurl a false accusation at her. However, Lakshmi's brother is determined to stand by her side.

title: Madha Matthu Manasi
subTitle: Madha is in love with Manasi, but she has feelings for someone else. Soon, he helps her unite with her lover and also strives to save her from some goons.

title: Madha Matthu Manasi
subTitle: Madha is in love with Manasi, but she has feelings for someone else. Soon, he helps her unite with her lover and also strives to save her from some goons.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Tarakasura's three sons, Tarakaksha, Vidyunmali, and Kamalaksha, possess immense power. Shambuki discloses that they are engaged in rigorous penance to appease Brahma Deva and obtain a crucial boon. Will Brahma Deva grant their earnest request?

title: Minchina Ota
subTitle: Two petty thieves rope other small-time criminals into their get-rich-quick schemes and attempt to steal cars for a living.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Tarakasura receives word of Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati's newborn and sets out to locate him. Meanwhile, Karthikeya engages in battle with Tarakasura's followers to demonstrate Lord Shiva's supremacy.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Shankachuda, having lost his men in the battle, extends an invitation to Kartikeya to confront Tarakasura. Will Kartikeya accept Shankachuda's challenge and face Tarakasura in battle?

title: Thavarige Baa Thangi
subTitle: Lakshmi faces trouble when her in-laws hurl a false accusation at her. However, Lakshmi's brother is determined to stand by her side.

title: Gokarna
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Iruvudellava Bittu
subTitle: Poorvi, an independent woman, leaves her family and boyfriend, Dev, due to her ego and self-conceit. Despite making several imprudent decisions, her life comes back on track after meeting Akash.

title: Chennamma IPS
subTitle: When an honest police officer, Chennamma, learns about Appanna, a gangster, and his cruel son's tyranny, she decides to kill them and eliminate all the anti-social elements of society.

title: Chitta Chora
subTitle: A modern-day Robin Hood steals money from the rich to help the poor. Trouble ensues when his theft results in the kidnapping of a corrupt minister's daughter.

title: Akira
subTitle: Two heartbroken individuals find solace in each other. However, complications arise when the man discovers his new love interest is close friends with his ex.
